_comment: Version override manifest for compose-tvos-redirect. Convention is same-version-as-requested; entries here only cover exceptions where the dev.sajidali.* fork is published at a different version than upstream. Keys: 'group:versionPattern', 'group.*:versionPattern', 'group:artifact:versionPattern', or '*:versionPattern'. Wildcard '1.10.*' matches any 1.10.x. 'gradlePlugin' (schema 2+) pins the version of the substituted dev.sajidali.compose:compose-gradle-plugin artifact used by the org.jetbrains.compose plugin-marker interception. Entries below reflect the actual tvos-publishing fork publish (task-8c) and the demo E2E reassessment (task-10c): material3/navigation-compose track the fork's own published alpha lines, while lifecycle/savedstate cover the older upstream versions the fork's own internal cross-library dependency edges still request (task-8c closure-audit WARN findings) versus what the fork actually republishes.
